titleKo: GYRO COMPASS MAIN UNIT과 REPEATER HEADING 일치 여부
titleEn: Verify synchronized compass heading between main unit and repeaters
guideline: S/G RM) If the Gyro compass unit is digital, take a photo of the digital readings

titleKo: MAGNETIC COMPASS 조명 상태 및 기포 발생 여부 점검
titleEn: Verify magnetic compass for proper illumination and absence of air bubbles

titleKo: SART/EPIRB TEST 결과 확인 및 담당자 조작 방법 숙지 상태 점검
titleEn: Verify SART/EPIRB test results and ensure responsible officer's familiarity with test procedures
guideline: SART) 12 circles are drawn centered on the vessel while at berth, but represented by 12 dots while underway. / EPIRB) If photographing the test mode is difficult due to brief illumination, take a photo of the actual test being performed.

titleKo: RADAR PM TEST 시행 결과 및 담당자 조작 방법 숙달 상태 점검
titleEn: Verify RADAR PM test results and ensure responsible officer's familiarity with test procedures
guideline: Radar) For Solid State Radars, patterns such as arcs do not appear during PM tests. Only data values are displayed.

titleKo: MF/HF DSC TEST 시행 결과 확인 및 담당자 조작 방법 숙달 상태 점검
titleEn: Verify MF/HF DSC test results and ensure responsible officer's familiarity with test procedures
guideline: DSC Test) Conduct tests with coast stations rather than ship stations whenever possible.

titleKo: BNWAS 단계별 ALARM 작동 및 비상호출장치 상태 점검
titleEn: Verify operational status of BNWAS sequential alarms and emergency call functions
guideline: BNWAS) Although audible alarms cannot be evidenced by photos, it is recommended to actually test stages 1, 2 and 3.

titleKo: GMDSS CONSOLE 및 선교 비상등 작동 상태 점검
titleEn: Verify operational status of GMDSS console and bridge emergency lights

titleKo: VDR 정상 작동 상태 및 담당자 PLAYBACK 방법 숙달 상태 점검
titleEn: Verify normal operation of VDR without alarms and ensure responsible officer's familiarity with playback procedures
guideline: VDR Alarm) It is normal for no alarms to be present. / Play back) Conduct the playback by referring to the maker's manual.
